// This code initializes the freestar object and creates several objects within it.
  var freestar = freestar || {};

// freestar.queue: Holds code that the Freestar engine will execute
  freestar.queue = freestar.queue || [];

// freestar.config: Stores all configuration options
  freestar.config = freestar.config || {};

// freestar.config.enabled_slots: Stores each ad placement
  freestar.config.enabled_slots = [];

// freestar.initCallback: Calls newAdSlots and fetches ads from enabled_slots
  freestar.initCallback = function () { 
(freestar.config.enabled_slots.length === 0) 
? freestar.initCallbackCalled = false 
: freestar.newAdSlots(freestar.config.enabled_slots) 
}
</script>

        <div class="l-page__content">
                <div id="block-mainpagecontent" class="block block-system block-system-main-block">
  
    
      <article>

  
    

  
  <div>
    
      <div class="field field--name-components field--type-entity-reference-revisions field--label-hidden field__items">
              <div class="field__item">
  



<div class="lps hero-landing-wrap lps--first ">
        <div class="l-container__content hero-landing">
      <div
        class="hero-story-wrap ">
        <div class="hero-story">
                      <div class="hero-story__media">
                    <picture>
                  <source srcset="https://ufc.com/images/styles/800x450_1/s3/2026-02/021226-Houston-Main-Event-hero.jpg?h=d1cb525d&amp;itok=axgcEH0B 1x, https://ufc.com/images/styles/800x450_2/s3/2026-02/021226-Houston-Main-Event-hero.jpg?h=d1cb525d&amp;itok=g9Z8rB8n 2x" media="(min-width: 768px)" type="image/jpeg" width="800" height="450"/>
              <source srcset="https://ufc.com/images/styles/767x432_1/s3/2026-02/021226-Houston-Main-Event-hero.jpg?h=d1cb525d&amp;itok=3DR3l6jt 1x, https://ufc.com/images/styles/767x432_2/s3/2026-02/021226-Houston-Main-Event-hero.jpg?h=d1cb525d&amp;itok=_aM5mkhM 2x" media="(min-width: 390px)" type="image/jpeg" width="767" height="432"/>
              <source srcset="https://ufc.com/images/styles/390x220_1/s3/2026-02/021226-Houston-Main-Event-hero.jpg?h=d1cb525d&amp;itok=ei2jf94C 1x, https://ufc.com/images/styles/390x220_2/s3/2026-02/021226-Houston-Main-Event-hero.jpg?h=d1cb525d&amp;itok=pd2N-Xh_ 2x" media="(min-width: 0)" type="image/jpeg" width="390" height="220"/>
                  <img loading="lazy" src="https://ufc.com/images/styles/390x220_1/s3/2026-02/021226-Houston-Main-Event-hero.jpg?h=d1cb525d&amp;itok=ei2jf94C" width="390" height="220" alt="Sean Strickland and Anthony Hernandez" />

  </picture>



            </div>
                    <div class="hero-story__content">
            <div class="hero-story__line line-decorator"></div>
                        <h1
              class="hero-hero-story__title">UFC Хьюстон</h1>                          <div class="hero-hero-story__body">
                Стрикланд против Хернандеза, возвращение Спивака и другие поединки. 
              </div>
                                      <div class="hero-hero-story__cta-wrap">
                                  <a href="https://www.ufc.ru/event/ufc-fight-night-february-21-2026"
                     class="hero-story__cta button-landing-color hero-story__cta--black-white">
                    <span>Полный кард турнира</span>
                  </a>
                                  <a href="https://ufcfightpass.ru/"
                     class="hero-story__cta button-landing-color hero-story__cta--white-black">
                    <span>Смотреть турнир</span>
                  </a>
                              </div>
                      </div>
        </div>
      </div>
              <div class="hero-story-links-wrap">
          <div class="hero-story-links">
            <h2 class="hero-story-links__title">Главные новости</h2>
            <ol class="hero-story-links__list">
                                                <li class="hero-story-links__item">
                    <div class="hero-story-links__item-inner">
                      <p
                        class="hero-story-links__category ">Анонсы</p>                      <a href="/news/movsar-evloev-provedyot-boy-s-leronom-myorfi-21-marta"
                                                  class="hero-story-links__link">
                        Мовсар Евлоев проведёт бой с Лероном Мёрфи 21 марта
                      </a>
                    </div>
                  </li>
                                                                <li class="hero-story-links__item">
                    <div class="hero-story-links__item-inner">
                      <p

                                            <div class="c-carousel__item">

  <div class="story-slider__label"><p>Номерной турнир</p></div>  <div class="story-slide__media">

  <div class="l-grid-item__inner">
        <div class="l-grid-item__oembed l-grid-item__oembed--youtube">

      <div class="hero-profile__info">
                  <h2 class="hero-profile__custom-title hero-profile__name">Боец дня</h2>                          <div class="hero-profile__tags">

              Турниры
          
  
                          </span>
                    <span class="c-card__info-suffix">
            <div class="field field--name-datetime field--type-datetime field--label-hidden field__item">1 year ago</div>
      </span>        </div>
      
              <div class="c-card__headline">
                    <h3 class="e-t3" id="n-145516">
            
<span>UFC 312: Дю Плесси vs Стрикланд 2 – результаты взвешивания + битвы взглядов</span>

          </h3>
        </div>
      
    </div>
  
      <div class="c-card__body e-p--small">
      
            <div class="field field--name-teaser field--type-text-long field--label-hidden field__item"><p>Дрикус Дю Плесси и Шон Стрикланд показали одинаковый вес, Татьяна Суарез была незначительно легче Вейли Жанг и другие результаты взвешивания перед UFC 312.</p>
</div>
      
    </div>
  
  
</a>


              </div>
                                            <div class="c-carousel__item">
                            



<a href="/news/gde-smotret-ufc-312-dyu-plessi-vs-strikland-2" class="c-card"    >

    
  <div class="c-card__media">
                  
            <div class="field field--name-thumbnail field--type-entity-reference field--label-hidden field__item"><div>
  
        <picture>
                  <source srcset="https://ufc.com/images/styles/346x260_1/s3/2025-02/020825-Sean-Strickland-hero-GettyImages-2155666696.jpg?h=d1cb525d&amp;itok=gZFcwp0F 1x, https://ufc.com/images/styles/346x260_2/s3/2025-02/020825-Sean-Strickland-hero-GettyImages-2155666696.jpg?h=d1cb525d&amp;itok=WIWReclQ 2x" media="(min-width: 768px)" type="image/jpeg" width="346" height="260"/>
              <source srcset="https://ufc.com/images/styles/613x460_1/s3/2025-02/020825-Sean-Strickland-hero-GettyImages-2155666696.jpg?h=d1cb525d&amp;itok=u8S3payM 1x, https://ufc.com/images/styles/613x460_2/s3/2025-02/020825-Sean-Strickland-hero-GettyImages-2155666696.jpg?h=d1cb525d&amp;itok=cGtWxj4b 2x" media="(min-width: 390px)" type="image/jpeg" width="613" height="460"/>

              <div class="c-card__info">
                      <span class="c-card__info-prefix">
                              
      
              Анонсы
          
  
                          </span>
                    <span class="c-card__info-suffix">
            <div class="field field--name-datetime field--type-datetime field--label-hidden field__item">1 year ago</div>
      </span>        </div>
      
              <div class="c-card__headline">
                    <h3 class="e-t3" id="n-139302">
            
<span>Где смотреть UFC 302: Махачев vs Порье</span>

          </h3>
        </div>
      
    </div>
  
      <div class="c-card__body e-p--small">
      
            <div class="field field--name-teaser field--type-text-long field--label-hidden field__item"><p>Махачев - Порье, Стрикланд - Коста, Романов - Алмейда, где смотреть бесплатно онлайн, прямая трансляция UFC 302, во сколько начнётся UFC 302,полная информация о трансляции UFC 302.</p>
</div>
      
    </div>
  
  
</a>


              </div>
                                            <div class="c-carousel__item">
                            



<a href="/news/ufc-296-pervye-slova-drikusa-dyu-plessi-shona-striklanda-i-movsara-evloeva-posle-turnira" class="c-card"    >

    
  <div class="c-card__media">
                  
            <div class="field field--name-thumbnail field--type-entity-reference field--label-hidden field__item"><div>
  
        <picture>
                  <source srcset="https://ufc.com/images/styles/346x260_1/s3/2024-01/UFC_JB_2024-01-20_0470_resized.JPG?h=e5aec6c8&amp;itok=6bUrs8Gd 1x, https://ufc.com/images/styles/346x260_2/s3/2024-01/UFC_JB_2024-01-20_0470_resized.JPG?h=e5aec6c8&amp;itok=dEGl_e1O 2x" media="(min-width: 768px)" type="image/jpeg" width="346" height="260"/>
              <source srcset="https://ufc.com/images/styles/613x460_1/s3/2024-01/UFC_JB_2024-01-20_0470_resized.JPG?h=e5aec6c8&amp;itok=tAC8DLju 1x, https://ufc.com/images/styles/613x460_2/s3/2024-01/UFC_JB_2024-01-20_0470_resized.JPG?h=e5aec6c8&amp;itok=xeGF6UGE 2x" media="(min-width: 390px)" type="image/jpeg" width="613" height="460"/>
              <source srcset="https://ufc.com/images/styles/312x234_1/s3/2024-01/UFC_JB_2024-01-20_0470_resized.JPG?h=e5aec6c8&amp;itok=BL2ovvVb 1x, https://ufc.com/images/styles/312x234_2/s3/2024-01/UFC_JB_2024-01-20_0470_resized.JPG?h=e5aec6c8&amp;itok=G42kuBms 2x" media="(min-width: 0)" type="image/jpeg" width="312" height="234"/>

  </picture>



</div>
</div>
      
                
        
        

  </div> 
        <div class="c-card__allinfo">

              <div class="c-card__info">
                      <span class="c-card__info-prefix">
                              
      
              Бойцы
          
  
                          </span>
                    <span class="c-card__info-suffix">
            <div class="field field--name-datetime field--type-datetime field--label-hidden field__item">2 year ago</div>
      </span>        </div>
      
              <div class="c-card__headline">
                    <h3 class="e-t3" id="n-136220">
            
<span>UFC 296: Первые слова Дрикуса Дю Плесси, Шона Стрикланда и Мовсара Евлоева после турнира</span>

          </h3>
        </div>
      
    </div>
  
      <div class="c-card__body e-p--small">
      
            <div class="field field--name-teaser field--type-text-long field--label-hidden field__item"><p>Первые слова главных героев UFC 297 - Дрикуса Дю Плесси, Шона Стрикланда и Пэдди Мовсара Евлоева - после ярких поединков на турнире в Торонто.&nbsp;</p>
</div>
      
    </div>
  
  
</a>


              </div>
                                            <div class="c-carousel__item">
                            



<a href="/news/rezultaty-i-bonusy-ufc-297-strikland-vs-dyu-plessi" class="c-card"    >

            <div class="field field--name-thumbnail field--type-entity-reference field--label-hidden field__item"><div>

                  <source srcset="https://ufc.com/images/styles/346x260_1/s3/2024-01/012023-dricus-du-plessis-ufc-297-GettyImages-1949056070.jpg?h=e27dfcf5&amp;itok=dkzFmyXw 1x, https://ufc.com/images/styles/346x260_2/s3/2024-01/012023-dricus-du-plessis-ufc-297-GettyImages-1949056070.jpg?h=e27dfcf5&amp;itok=7B1rSmBd 2x" media="(min-width: 768px)" type="image/jpeg" width="346" height="260"/>

        <div class="c-card__allinfo">

              <div class="c-card__info">
                      <span class="c-card__info-prefix">
                              
      
              Результаты

                    <span class="c-card__info-suffix">
            <div class="field field--name-datetime field--type-datetime field--label-hidden field__item">2 year ago</div>
      </span>        </div>
      
              <div class="c-card__headline">
                    <h3 class="e-t3" id="n-136206">
            
<span>Результаты и бонусы UFC 297: Стрикланд vs Дю Плесси</span>

          </h3>
        </div>
      
    </div>
  
      <div class="c-card__body e-p--small">
      
            <div class="field field--name-teaser field--type-text-long field--label-hidden field__item"><p>Дрикус Дю Плесси победил Шона Стрикланда, Ракэль Пеннингтон победила Майру Буэно Силву, Мовсар Евлоев победил Арнольда Аллена и другие результаты турнира UFC 297.</p>
</div>
      
    </div>

              </div>

              Турниры

                    <span class="c-card__info-suffix">
            <div class="field field--name-datetime field--type-datetime field--label-hidden field__item">2 year ago</div>
      </span>        </div>
      
              <div class="c-card__headline">
                    <h3 class="e-t3" id="n-136117">
            
<span>UFC 297: Стрикланд vs Дю Плесси – результаты взвешивания + битвы взглядов</span>

          </h3>
        </div>
      
    </div>
  
      <div class="c-card__body e-p--small">
      
            <div class="field field--name-teaser field--type-text-long field--label-hidden field__item"><p>Шон Стрикланд оказался тяжелее Дрикуса Дю Плесси, Арнольд Аллен был легче Мовсара Евлоева&nbsp;и другие результаты взвешивания перед UFC 297.</p>
